query: North Korea nuclear test 2026 - any signs of imminent 7th nuclear test, activity at Punggye-ri test site, recent statements or preparations mid-2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings on a potential North Korean 7th nuclear test as of mid-July 2026:

**Bottom line:** No public indicators of an *imminent* test, but the site is assessed as fully ready pending only Kim Jong Un's political decision.

**Punggye-ri status:**
- Tunnel No. 3 has been restored and, since ~2022, both U.S. and ROK intelligence assess all technical test preparations are complete.
- CSIS Beyond Parallel satellite updates repeatedly show "no major activity" — a ready-but-dormant posture. No last-minute pre-detonation signatures reported.
- Tunnel No. 4 shows intermittent longer-term construction.

**Latest intelligence:**
- **Nov 5, 2025:** ROK Defense Intelligence Agency told lawmakers NK can test "on short notice," only awaiting Kim's go-ahead — no date given.
- **April 15, 2026:** IAEA cited a "serious increase" in weapons production (~few dozen warheads), a new enrichment facility — but no mention of testing/Punggye-ri.

**2026 North Korean posture** — heavy on rhetoric and fissile-material expansion, not testing:
- Feb 2026: Party Congress + parade, pledges to strengthen nuclear program.
- March 2026: Kim vows to "irreversibly" cement nuclear-state status.
- June 3, 2026: New nuclear-fuel production plant unveiled.
- June 20–22, 2026 Party Plenary: Kim called to expand the arsenal "to overtake the world" — but **announced no test**.

A 7th test thus remains a latent, politically-gated option: technically prepared, but with no observed operational test-prep activity and no announcement through mid-2026. Full structured findings, sources, and data points have been submitted.

sources.snippet: June 20-22, 2026 2nd plenary of 9th Central Committee reaffirmed nuclear expansion; no test announced.

sources.snippet: Feb 26, 2026 nighttime military parade (~14,000 troops); Kim pledges to strengthen nuclear program.

sources.snippet: CSIS satellite analysis: no major activity observed at Punggye-ri despite ROK high-possibility warnings.

sources.snippet: No significant activity at Tunnel No. 3; US and ROK assess NK has finished all test preparations at this tunnel.

sources.title: Punggye-ri Nuclear Test Site
sources.snippet: Six tests: Oct 2006, May 2009, Feb 2013, Jan 2016, Sep 2016, Sep 2017.

sources.title: North Korea's Kim doubles down on nuclear buildup
sources.snippet: Analysis of June 2026 plenary: no intention to denuclearize; shift toward arms-control framing.
